---
title: "Performance"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Performance}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

Large images should be downsampled before art conversion. Each transformation
has a `max_dimension` argument.

```{r}
img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))
system.time(image_mosaic_art(img, tile_size = 12, max_dimension = 800))
system.time(image_circle_art(img, n = 1000, color_method = "center", max_dimension = 700))
```

The pure-R Canny approximation and circle mean/median sampling are intentionally
portable. Future compiled code could optimize those hotspots.
